mapper.select:
SELECT MIN(GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, 'KO')) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM ,MIN(ECCT.CONT_NUM) AS CONT_NUM ,MIN(ECCT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_CNT ,MIN(ECCT.CONT_DESC) AS CONT_DESC ,MIN(POHD.SUBJECT) AS SUBJECT ,CASE WHEN MIN(POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE) = 'DRAFT' THEN MIN(ECCT.CONT_DESC) ELSE MIN(POHD.SUBJECT) END AS CONT_NM ,POPY.PO_NUM ,MIN(POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE) AS PO_CREATE_DATE ,MIN(POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE) AS PO_CREATE_TYPE ,POPY.PAY_CNT ,MIN(POPY.PAY_CNT_NM) AS PAY_CNT_NM ,MIN(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT ,MIN(NVL(IVHD.INV_AMT,0)) AS INV_AMT ,MIN(NVL(IVPC.AP_REQ_AMT,0)) AS AP_REQ_AMT ,MIN(NVL(IVAP.AP_AMT,0)) AS AP_AMT ,MIN(NVL(GETCOMCODE(IVHD.GATE_CD, 'M101', IVHD.PROGRESS_CD, 0, 'KO'),' ')) AS PROGRESS_CD_IVHD ,MIN(NVL(GETCOMCODE(IVAP.GATE_CD, 'NH0025', IVAP.SIGN_STATUS, 0, 'KO'),' ')) AS PROGRESS_CD_IVAP ,(CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(IVAP.SIGN_STATUS,' ')) = '70' THEN '대금지급완료' WHEN MIN(NVL(IVAP.SIGN_STATUS,' ')) IN ('20','50') THEN '대금지급요청완료' WHEN MIN(NVL(IVAP.SIGN_STATUS,' ')) IN ('10','40') OR (MIN(NVL(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD,' ')) IN ('300','700') AND MIN(IVAP.SIGN_STATUS) IS NULL) THEN '검수완료' WHEN (MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'DI' AND MIN(NVL(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD,' ')) = '200') OR (MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'PI' AND MIN(NVL(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD,' ')) = '100') THEN '검수요청완료' WHEN (MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'DI' AND MIN(NVL(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD,' ')) IN ('100','400')) OR (MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'PI' AND MIN(NVL(IVHD.PROGRESS_CD,' ')) IN ('50','500')) THEN '검수미요청' ELSE '미진행' END) AS PROGRESS_NM ,(CASE WHEN MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'DI' THEN MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) ELSE MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(IVGH.SEND_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) END) AS SEND_DATE ,(CASE WHEN MIN(IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE) = 'DI' THEN MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(GRDT.GR_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) ELSE MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(IVHD.INV_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) END) AS INV_DATE ,MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(IVAP.AP_REQ_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) AS AP_REQ_DATE ,MIN(NVL(TO_CHAR(IVAP.AP_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD'),' ')) AS AP_DATE ,MIN(NVL(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.VENDOR_CD, 'KO'),' ')) AS VENDOR_NM ,MIN(NVL(GETDECPERSONALINFO( IVHD.PIC_USER_NM ),' ')) AS PIC_USER_NM ,MIN(NVL(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'KO'),' ')) AS CTRL_USER_NM FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND POPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON (ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVGH.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCGRDT GRDT ON (GRDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND GRDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND GRDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND GRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND GRDT.GR_SQ = '1') LEFT JOIN STOCIVPC IVPC ON (IVPC.GATE_CD = POPC.GATE_CD AND IVPC.BUYER_CD = POPC.BUYER_CD AND IVPC.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVPC.PO_NUM = POPC.PO_NUM AND IVPC.DEPT_CD = POPC.DEPT_CD AND IVPC.PAY_CNT = POPC.PAY_CNT AND IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD = POPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD = POPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCIVAP IVAP ON (IVAP.GATE_CD = IVPC.GATE_CD AND IVAP.BUYER_CD = IVPC.BUYER_CD AND IVAP.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVAP.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND IVAP.DEPT_CD = IVHD.DEPT_CD AND IVAP.PAY_CNT = IVPC.PAY_CNT AND IVAP.PY_BUYER_CD = IVPC.PY_BUYER_CD AND IVAP.PY_DEPT_CD = IVPC.PY_DEPT_CD AND IVAP.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE BETWEEN #{PO_CREATE_DATE_FROM} AND #{PO_CREATE_DATE_TO}
AND (UPPER(POPY.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(POHD.SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{PO_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND (UPPER(ECCT.CONT_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(ECCT.CONT_DESC, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{CONT_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
AND POPC.PY_BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD}
AND UPPER(getCustName(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND POPC.PY_DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_CD}
AND UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVGH.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SETTEL_VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SETTEL_VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IS NULL
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('50','500')
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '100'
AND ((IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '700' AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IS NULL) OR IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('10','40'))
AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS IN ('20','50')
AND IVAP.SIGN_STATUS = '70'
AND UPPER(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PIC_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.CTRL_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CTRL_USER_NM}) '%'
GROUP BY POPY.PO_NUM,POPY.PAY_CNT,IVAP.AP_NUM,POPC.PY_BUYER_CD,POPC.PY_DEPT_CD,POPC.GATE_CD ORDER BY POPY.PO_NUM DESC, POPY.PAY_CNT DESC ,IVAP.AP_NUM DESC,POPC.PY_BUYER_CD DESC,POPC.PY_DEPT_CD DESC

SELECT FIN.BUYER_CD ,FIN.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(FIN.GATE_CD, MAX(FIN.PR_BUYER_CD), MAX(FIN.PR_DEPT_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM ,FIN.RFX_NUM ,FIN.RFX_CNT ,MAX(FIN.RFX_SUBJECT) AS RFX_SUBJECT ,(FIN.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_START_DATE ,(FIN.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RFX_END_DATE ,FIN.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(FIN.GATE_CD, FIN.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM ,GETDECPERSONALINFO(FIN.PIC_USER_NM) AS PIC_USER_NM ,GETDECPERSONALINFO(FIN.PIC_TEL_NUM) AS PIC_TEL_NUM ,GETDECPERSONALINFO(FIN.PIC_EMAIL) AS PIC_EMAIL ,MAX(FIN.PROGRESS_CD) AS PROGRESS_CD ,GETCODENAME(FIN.GATE_CD, 'M240', MAX(FIN.PROGRESS_CD), #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_CD_NM ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN FIN.RNUM_VOTE_CNT = 1 THEN TO_CHAR((FIN.QTA_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,999,999') END,' ,') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FIN.RFX_CNT) AS QTA_AMT ,(SUM(CASE WHEN FIN.RNUM_PR_CNT = 1 THEN FIN.PR_AMT END),0) AS PR_AMT ,(SUM(CASE WHEN FIN.RNUM_RFX_CNT = 1 THEN FIN.FINAL_ESTM_PRC END),0) AS FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,(SUM(CASE WHEN FIN.RNUM_CONT_CNT = 1 THEN FIN.CONT_AMT END),0) AS CONT_AMT ,LISTAGG(CASE WHEN FIN.RNUM_CONT_CNT = 1 THEN FIN.CONT_NUM_CNT END,' | ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY FIN.CONT_NUM_CNT) AS CONT_NUM_CNT ,(CASE WHEN MAX(FIN.PROGRESS_CD) IN ('2550','1300') THEN '' WHEN MAX(FIN.PROGRESS_CD) = '2500' THEN (CASE WHEN FIN.SETTEL_CNT = 0 THEN 'N' WHEN FIN.SETTEL_CNT = FIN.SEND_CNT THEN 'Y' WHEN (FIN.SETTEL_CNT > 0 AND FIN.SETTEL_CNT < FIN.SEND_CNT) THEN 'S' ELSE '' END) ELSE '' /** 선정대기(A), 탈락(N), 선정(Y), 부분선정(S) */ END) AS SETTLE_FLAG FROM ( SELECT RQHD.GATE_CD ,RQHD.BUYER_CD ,RQHD.RFX_NUM ,RQHD.RFX_CNT ,RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT ,RQHD.RFX_START_DATE ,RQHD.RFX_END_DATE ,QTHD.QTA_AMT ,RQVN.VENDOR_CD ,QTHD.PIC_USER_NM ,QTHD.PIC_TEL_NUM ,QTHD.PIC_EMAIL ,RQHD.PROGRESS_CD ,CASE WHEN ECMT.CONT_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN ECMT.CONT_NUM'-'ECMT.CONT_CNT'/('TO_CHAR(ECCT.CONT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD')')/('TO_CHAR((ECCT.CONT_AMT,0), 'FM999,999,999,999,999')')' ELSE '' END AS CONT_NUM_CNT ,(ECMT.CONT_CNT,0) AS CONT_CNT ,ECCT.CONT_DATE ,ECCT.CONT_AMT ,PRDT.PR_AMT ,BDES.FINAL_ESTM_PRC ,PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD ,PRDT.PR_DEPT_CD ,CASE WHEN ECMT.CONT_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT ORDER BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,ECMT.CONT_NUM,ECMT.CONT_CNT DESC) ELSE 0 END AS RNUM_CONT_CNT ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,RQHD.RFX_NUM,RQHD.RFX_CNT ORDER BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,RQHD.RFX_NUM,RQHD.RFX_CNT DESC) AS RNUM_VOTE_CNT ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,RQHD.RFX_NUM,RQHD.RFX_CNT,PRDT.PR_NUM,PRDT.PR_SQ ORDER BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,PRDT.PR_NUM,PRDT.PR_SQ DESC) AS RNUM_PR_CNT ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,RQHD.RFX_NUM,RQHD.RFX_CNT ORDER BY RQVN.VENDOR_CD,RQHD.RFX_NUM,RQHD.RFX_CNT DESC) AS RNUM_RFX_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCQTDT QTDT WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SEND_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCQTDT QTDT WHERE QTDT.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND QTDT.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND QTDT.QTA_NUM = QTHD.QTA_NUM AND QTDT.SETTLE_QT > 0 AND QTDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS SETTEL_CNT FROM STOCRQDT RQDT JOIN STOCRQHD RQHD ON (RQDT.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND RQHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('2500')) JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCQTHD QTHD ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = QTHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = QTHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = QTHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = QTHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = QTHD.VENDOR_CD AND QTHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND RQDT.PR_SQ = PRDT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCECCT ECCT ON( ECMT.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0') ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND RQDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ) LEFT JOIN STOCBDES BDES ON( RQDT.GATE_CD = BDES.GATE_CD AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = BDES.BUYER_CD AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = BDES.BID_NUM AND BDES.BID_CNT = '1' AND BDES.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQDT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND RQDT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_END_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND RQHD.RFX_START_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(PRDT.GATE_CD, PRDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = #{SETTEL_VENDOR_CD}
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(RQVN.GATE_CD, RQVN.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SETTEL_VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(RQHD.RFX_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{RFX_NUM}) '%' OR UPPER(REPLACE(RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT, ' ', '')) LIKE '%' UPPER(REPLACE(#{RFX_NUM}, ' ', '')) '%')
) FIN GROUP BY FIN.GATE_CD,FIN.BUYER_CD,FIN.PR_BUYER_CD,FIN.RFX_NUM,FIN.RFX_CNT,FIN.RFX_START_DATE,FIN.RFX_END_DATE,FIN.VENDOR_CD,FIN.PIC_USER_NM, FIN.PIC_TEL_NUM, FIN.PIC_EMAIL, FIN.SEND_CNT, FIN.SETTEL_CNT ORDER BY FIN.RFX_NUM DESC,FIN.RFX_CNT DESC, (CASE WHEN SETTLE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC
